title: balsamorhiza macrolepis var. platylepis
intro: Balsamorhiza macrolepis var. platylepis, also known as the Rocky Mountain balsamroot, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Balsamorhiza macrolepis var. platylepis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Balsamorhiza macrolepis var. platylepis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for various herbal applications.
